scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n FE,BE -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:fe" "npm run dev:be"
scripts.install:all: npx concurrently "npm run install:fe" "npm run install:be"
scripts.clean: npx concurrently "cd frontend && rm -rf node_modules/.vite" "cd Backend && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; exit 0"
